name: [smoke] renders with error string without crashing
[fn] required=true renders asterisk " *" in label row
[fn] no label → no label text in tree
[fn] custom infoIconSlot replaces default info icon
[fn] label and description both render in label area
[fn] onFocus fires when input is focused
[fn] onBlur fires when input loses focus
[fn] readOnly: readOnly=true set on TextInput (editable stays true)
[fn] error string renders as feedback text below input
[fn] invalid=true applies errorHighlight chrome on inner Input
[fn] error="" (empty string) does NOT render feedback row
[fn] custom feedback ReactNode renders below input
[fn] feedback prop wins over error string
[fn] helperButton text renders in dynamic row
[fn] helperButton Button is disabled when field is disabled
[fn] dynamicText renders when set — no dynamicTextSlot prop in InputField
[fn] start slot renders in inner Input
[fn] end slot renders in inner Input
[fn] testID goes to inner Input control (outer wrapper uses "${testID}-field")
[fn] testID outer wrapper ("-field" suffix) is distinct from the inner Input
[a11y] outer field wrapper has accessible=false (TextInput carries a11y)
[a11y] inner TextInput gets accessibilityLabel from label prop
[a11y] accessibilityLabel prop forwarded to inner TextInput
[a11y] aria-hidden on field → outer wrapper accessibilityElementsHidden=true
[a11y] required=true — asterisk " *" visible in tree (visual communication)
[fn] BUG-IF-3 FIXED: onHelperPress fires when helperButton is pressed
[fn] BUG-IF-2 FIXED: testID goes to inner Input, outer wrapper is "${testID}-field"
